arts.ttl: West Ham sign Brighton forward Ferguson on loan
arts.sum: Brighton forward Evan Ferguson has completed a loan move to West Ham United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: “Clubs interested” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham in Guilherme exit talks
arts.sum: West Ham are currently in talks over the possible loaning of Luis Guilherme, its been reported by ExWHUEmployee. The 18 year old Brazilian winger, who the club signed in the summer as part of Tim Steidten’s recommendations, has struggled to establish himself in east London and the club are open to allowing him to depart.... The post “Clubs interested” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham in Guilherme exit talks appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Carney Chukwuemeka to Borussia Dortmund: Are Chelsea receiving a loan fee? Is there an option-to-buy clause included?
arts.sum: The financial details surrounding Carney Chukwuemeka's loan move from Chelsea to German giants Borussia Dortmund have been revealed.

arts.ttl: West Ham announce Evan Ferguson loan signing from Brighton as shirt number revealed
arts.sum: West Ham United confirm the signing of Evan Ferguson on loan from Brighton & Hove Albion, and the Irish striker will wear the number 34 shirt for the Irons.

arts.ttl: West Ham complete Ferguson loan deal
arts.sum: West Ham have signed striker Evan Ferguson on loan from Brighton until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd Have Loan Offer for Christopher Nkunku Rejected
arts.sum: Manchester United have been unsuccessful in their attempt to sign Christopher Nkunku on loan from Chelsea

arts.ttl: Graham Potter stronger for Chelsea nightmare as West Ham boss prepares for first return
arts.sum: Former Blues boss heads back to Stamford Bridge in a better place and with no ill feeling, though closure not on the cards
